version_description: Very basic acoustic chord chart in the key of G. Can Capo up as needed (original song is in key of C).

versions.version_description: Acoustic version as seen on the Tonight Show. Added notes about the C/G usage and why there is no Am chord.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Key of G
Tempo - 72bpm
4/4 time
1 2 3 4  1  2  3  4
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't have to leave this town to see the world[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause it's something that I gotta do[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna look back in 30 years[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And wonder who you're married to[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Wanna say it now, wanna make it clear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
For only you and God to hear[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
When you love someone, they say you set 'em free[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
But that ain't gonna work for me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna live without you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
All the wasted days, all the wasted nights[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I blame it all on being young[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Got no regrets 'cause it got me here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
But I don't wanna waste another one[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
I been thinkin' about what I want in my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
It begins and ends the same[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
If I had to choose what I couldn't lose[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
There'd only be one thing[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna live without you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you (You)[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
Wanna say it now, wanna make it clear[/tab]
    C                        //G
For only you and God to hear

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna live without you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me (Next to me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you (I don't wanna love nobody)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you (You)[/tab]

[Tag]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody (You)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
